title: Buggy’s Cannon Threatens Orange Town
description: On pages 7–9, Buggy’s crew threatens Orange Town with overwhelming force, turning the town itself into a hostage.
scene: Buggy’s pirates rely on spectacle and destruction, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami are forced to react under pressure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: THIS PLACE WAS A WILDERNESS WHEN WE GOT HERE.

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: "WE'LL FORGET OUR OLD TOWN THAT THE PIRATES DESTROYED."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: At first, it was just a few homes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We worked hard, cleared the land. Over time people came and opened up shops.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: AND LOOK AT US NOW! WE'RE A THRIVING FORT!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: We old Timers built this town from nothing!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This town and its people are my treasure!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: I'd be a sorry excuse for a mayor if I didn't try to protect the town!

summary: The part shows how Buggy rules through fear, while the Straw Hats begin breaking that fear through defiance and improvisation.
